FROM

 (
 select EXTENSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ERP_EXT_B
 minus
 select EXTENSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ERP_EXT_B
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.EXTENSION_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ERP_EXT_B.EXTENSION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ERP_EXT_B.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJECTS_ERP_EXT_B)
